name: Aluminum sesquichlorohydrate
description: Aluminum sesquichlorohydrate is an aluminum salt used as an antiperspirant agent, cosmetic astringent and deodorant agent. It works by physically blocking eccrine sweat gland ducts [A31171].

interactions.name: Dolutegravir
interactions.description: The serum concentration of Dolutegravir can be decreased when it is combined with Aluminum sesquichlorohydrate.
